default.description: Default capability set for the HQ Sync menubar webview.

desktop-alt-capability.description: Capability set for the Indigo-only desktop alternate UX window.

drift-detail.description: Capability set for the drift-detail secondary window. Needs event IPC to receive the DriftReport from Rust + permission to invoke the handshake / restore commands. Without this file, invoke() calls from the window silently fail at the capability check — the symptom is a window that stays stuck on its loading state because drift_window_ready never reaches Rust.

meetings-window.description: Capability set for the Upcoming Meetings detail window. Needs to invoke meetings_* commands directly (self-fetches data, no main-window handshake).

new-files-detail.description: Capability set for the new-files detail window. Only needs event IPC to receive file list data from the main window.

share-detail.description: Capability set for the share-detail window. Receives event list via IPC; uses window.open() (Web API, no shell plugin needed) for the HQ Console link.
